module_role: Module 2 of v17 integration — CI cap mechanics, milestone effect queries, political legitimacy modifiers (Bonus Dice + Obstacle Modifier), Hafenmark suppress, Unification target-list generator. Depends on Module 1.

entries.quoted_text: CI starts at 28 per P-32. Unchanged.
CI runs to 100 (no freeze). Lower bound 0 (implicit, never negative).
CI runs to 100 (no freeze).
±5 CI per season from all sources combined (PP-504).
±3 from player Domain Actions specifically.
40 | Church Assertive | Church gains +1D on all Assert and Seizure rolls
Church gains +1D on all Assert and Seizure rolls
55 | Institutional Reach | All factions: Ob +1 to actions directly opposing Church Domain Actions
Ob +1 to actions directly opposing Church Domain Actions
65 | Church Dominant | Secular factions must spend an extra action slot ... to pass Parliamentary motions against Church (i.e., two slots not one)
two slots not one
Parliamentary motion = 1 card slot (default); doubled to 2 at CI 65 per ci_political §2.1
80 | Church Ascendant | Seizure Ob reduced by 1 globally. All territory PT drifts +1 toward piety pole at Year-End
entries.note: Redeclared from M1 for cross-module use; same value.

entries.quoted_text: When CI reaches 100: CI does not continue to advance; Church publicly declares Papal Sovereignty over the peninsula
entries.note: Redeclared from M1 for cross-module use; same value.

entries.quoted_text: When Church acts in any of the following contexts, it adds floor(CI/20) bonus dice to its roll
each secular faction voting against Church reduces their effective Mandate contribution by floor(CI/30)
Hafenmark with L >= 4 applies a flat -1 CI/season to Church (ED-110 resolution)
Baralta (CI -1/season) operates on the CI total.

entries.value: DA sub-cap applied first, then total cap, then hard bounds
entries.quoted_text: ±5 CI per season from all sources combined (PP-504). ±3 from player Domain Actions specifically.
entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION_TWO: ordering — sub-cap applies first, then total cap. Canon does not specify precedence.

entries.value: caller responsibility — 'kind' field in each delta
entries.quoted_text: ±3 from player Domain Actions specifically
entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION_ONE: M2 enforces caps; caller classifies which deltas are Domain-Action vs generated.

entries.value: threshold-inclusive (CI >= N triggers, not CI > N)
entries.quoted_text: 40 | Church Assertive (column header 'CI'); ... 80 | Church Ascendant ... at Year-End
entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION_THREE: canonical phrasing 'at CI 40' interpreted as CI >= 40 (standard tier-inclusive semantics).

entries.value: M2 returns the constant; caller decides which actions qualify
entries.quoted_text: actions directly opposing Church Domain Actions (Parliament motions targeting Church, Suppress attempts)
entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION_FOUR: M2 exposes the modifier value only; faction-action module classifies which actions qualify as 'directly opposing'.

entries.quoted_text: Mass Seizure (one-shot): Church declares simultaneous seizure on all territories with Church buildings. Ob = 10 − PT − infrastructure (floor 1). This is a one-time event.
entries.assumption: ASSUMPTION_FIVE: target = (a) has at least Chapel per M1.has_any_church_building AND (b) Church Prominent per §1 definition (controls OR Church Mandate > controlling faction Mandate). Church-controlled territories included (re-affirms during Unification). Inert territories excluded.

entries.quoted_text: t.accord = max(3.0, min(7.0, t.pt / 2 + 1))
entries.note: v15 used float PT directly; M2 accepts float PT for consistency. Floor + clamp ensures integer-tier-like steps.

provisional_assumptions.decision: Each delta in the source_deltas list carries a 'kind' field that the caller sets to 'domain_action' or 'generated'. M2 enforces caps based on these labels; M2 does not classify.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Canon §2.4 distinguishes 'from all sources' from 'from player Domain Actions' but does not enumerate which sources count as which. The integration module knows which call sites are Domain Actions.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: M7 integration must verify every CI delta is correctly tagged at the call site. Audit pass after M6 (which expands Domain Actions).

provisional_assumptions.decision: When both caps would clamp, Domain-Action sub-cap is applied first; the (clamped) DA total plus generated total is then clamped against the seasonal total cap. Generated absorbs the residual.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Canon §2.4 lists the caps but does not specify ordering. Sub-cap-first preserves Domain-Action ceiling as a strict ceiling on player-driven change; lets generated sources absorb the cap residual rather than capping the player's intentional Sermons under a piety-yield surge.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: If sim shows generated sources getting under-applied near the cap, reconsider whether DA should absorb residual instead. Recheck after M7 balance sweep.

provisional_assumptions.decision: All milestones are threshold-inclusive: CI >= N triggers the milestone effect.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Canon phrasing 'at CI 40 ... Church Assertive' is standard tier-inclusive language. Strictly-greater interpretation would require crossing 40 to trigger, which has odd interactions with the +/-5/season cap.

provisional_assumptions.decision: M2 returns the Ob modifier constant. The faction-action module decides which actions qualify as 'directly opposing Church Domain Actions'.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Canon names 'Parliament motions targeting Church' and 'Suppress attempts' as examples but does not enumerate exhaustively. The action module is where action types live; M2 stays a primitives module.
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: M6 must classify every action and apply the modifier where appropriate. Cross-check classification against canon §2.1 milestone 55 examples.

provisional_assumptions.decision: mass_seizure_unification_targets returns playable territories where (a) at least one settlement has Chapel+ AND (b) Church Prominent. Church-controlled territories included (re-affirms control during Unification). Inert (T15, T16) excluded.
provisional_assumptions.rationale: Canon §2.2 says 'all territories with Church buildings' — Chapel+ matches M1.has_any_church_building. Prominence is the §1 gating concept for CI/Seizure mechanics. Including Church-controlled territories matches the canonical 'simultaneous seizure' wording (Unification publicly re-asserts authority).
provisional_assumptions.follow_up: If sim shows Unification under-triggering because Church rarely has Chapel+ outside T9, this signals starting-infrastructure seeding needs expansion (M1 ASSUMPTION_TWO follow-up).
